sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشُّعَرَاءُ قَدِيمًا يَكْتُبُونَ عَنِ الصَّحْرَاءِ وَالنُّجُومِ.
sentences.translation: Drevni pjesnici su nekada pisali o pustinji i zvijezdama.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient poets used to write about the desert and the stars.

sentences.arabic: الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ جَمِيلٌ جِدًّا لِأَنَّهُ يَسْتَخْدِمُ كَلِمَاتٍ قَوِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija je veoma lijepa jer koristi snažne riječi.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic poetry is very beautiful because it uses powerful words.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الشَّاعِرُ إِنَّ الْقَلَمَ هُوَ صَدِيقُهُ الْوَفِيُّ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik kaže da je olovka njegov vjerni prijatelj.
sentences.translationEn: The poet says that the pen is his loyal friend.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ بَيْتٍ فِي الْقَصِيدَةِ يَحْمِلُ مَعْنًى عَمِيقًا.
sentences.translation: Svaki stih u pjesmi nosi duboko značenje.
sentences.translationEn: Every verse in the poem carries a deep meaning.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَقْرَأُ الشِّعْرَ لِنَفْهَمَ مَشَاعِرَ النَّاسِ فِي الْمَاضِي.
sentences.translation: Mi čitamo poeziju kako bismo razumjeli osjećanja ljudi u prošlosti.
sentences.translationEn: We read poetry to understand people's feelings in the past.
